data.title: HealthEquity shares fiscal year 2027 outlook at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, remains largest HSA custodian, reaffirms 2026 guidance.
data.description: In Draper, Utah on January 12, 2026, HealthEquity, Inc. (NASDAQ: HQY) revealed its projections for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2027. The company, known for being the top health savings account ("HSA") custodian in the nation based on the number of accounts held, also confirmed its earlier forecasts for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2026. HealthEquity serves as a leading provider of complimentary consumer-directed benefits ("CDBs").

data.title: Standard Chartered is preparing to launch a crypto brokerage platform and has reduced its ETH forecast amidst traditional banks embracing digital assets.
data.description: Reportedly, Standard Chartered is in the process of creating a crypto prime brokerage platform amidst the trend of traditional banks broadening their digital asset offerings. This move comes as no surprise given the increasing interest in cryptocurrency, with global trading volumes hitting $2.7 trillion in the first quarter of 2021 alone. The potential for growth in this sector is significant, as evidenced by the fact that Bitcoin's market cap surpassed $1 trillion earlier this year. The development of a crypto prime brokerage platform by Standard Chartered reflects the evolution and integration of digital assets into the mainstream financial landscape.

data.title: Karooooo Limited to announce Q3 2026 results on Jan 20. Webinar on Jan 21. Owns Cartrack and Karooooo Logistics.
data.description: Singapore-based Karooooo Limited (NASDAQ: KARO) is set to unveil its Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, January 20, 2026, post 04:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The Company, holding 100% of Cartrack and 81% of Karooooo Logistics, will conduct a Zoom webinar on Wednesday, January 21, 2026, at 08:00 a.m. Eastern Time (03:00 p.m. South African time; 09:00 p.m. Singaporean time) for investors and analysts to join in.

data.title: ZYUS Life Sciences plans to raise between C$15M to C$16M through a LIFE Offering.
data.description: In a recent development, approximately 200 people were reported missing after a boat capsized off the coast. The incident occurred in the early hours of the morning, and only 40 individuals have been rescued so far. Search and rescue operations are currently underway to locate the missing passengers. It is believed that bad weather conditions may have contributed to the capsizing of the boat. Authorities are urging anyone with information about the incident to come forward and assist in the search efforts.

data.title: Eagle Eye launches AI-powered solution for personalized promotions, maximizing offer conversion and engagement.
data.description: A cutting-edge promotional solution powered by artificial intelligence has been launched, providing individualized offers on a large scale with instant execution. This innovative technology comes from Eagle Eye, a prominent company specializing in Software as a Service (SaaS) and AI. The platform delivers personalized promotions, loyalty programs, and omnichannel marketing strategies. The development was announced on January 12, 2026, in London.

data.title: Fusion's employees exceeded their volunteerism goal by spending over 3,000 hours in the community supporting local nonprofits.
data.description: Fusion, a company based in Omaha, Nebraska, has recently announced that their employees have surpassed their volunteerism target for the year 2026. They dedicated over 3,000 hours to volunteering in the community and assisting local nonprofits. Fusion, which has been operating for 16 years, aims to positively impact the lives of all those it interacts with.

data.title: TurboTenant named 2026 'Best Places to Work' by Built In, recognized as Best Startup in Colorado.
data.description: A top property management platform, TurboTenant, has been named the Best Startup to Work for in Colorado. The accolade was announced on Jan. 12, 2026, in Fort Collins. TurboTenant is known as the leading all-in-one platform for property management in the nation. This recognition was awarded by Built In, solidifying TurboTenant's status as a standout employer in the region.

data.title: AI is reshaping digital marketing, with agency Wonderful Websites & SEO adapting after 17 years in business.
data.description: In Kennebunk, Maine, a renowned U.S.-based agency, Wonderful Websites & SEO, is celebrating its 17th year in business amidst the fast-paced evolution of artificial intelligence in the digital economy. The agency is doubling down on its commitment to supporting small businesses, leveraging AI technology to enhance their online presence. This move comes as businesses across the country are increasingly recognizing the importance of digital strategies in reaching consumers.

data.title: Dr. Mark Rubinstein promoted to Chief Medical Officer at Achieve Life Sciences after leading as Interim CMO.
data.description: A seasoned medical executive has been promoted to a permanent role after effectively serving as the Interim Chief Medical Officer. This transition follows a period of demonstrated leadership and achievement in the interim position.

data.title: Steve Neamtz appointed as President of Investment Adviser for Truth Social Funds and Yorkville America, LLC on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida on January 12, 2026, Truth Social Funds introduced a collection of exchange-traded funds centered around the America First theme. They partnered with Yorkville America, LLC, the umbrella organization for Yorkville America Equities, LLC, which serves as the registered investment adviser for Truth Social.

data.title: Viega North America appoints Dave DeLater as COO, with 30+ years of experience in expanding operations.
data.description: Viega North America, a leading company in press technology, recently welcomed a new operation executive with more than three decades of experience. The company, headquartered in Broomfield, Colorado, is expanding its presence in North America. The appointment was officially announced on January 12, 2026.

data.title: End Child Poverty California urges Gov. to use final budget to defend Californians, prevent cuts to safety net, and end child poverty. Applauds investments in Governor's proposed 2026-27 budget.
data.description: To address the issue of federal tax giveaways benefiting the wealthy and prevent cuts to essential safety net programs, it is crucial to implement progressive revenues. End Child Poverty California (ECPCA) has commended the Governor's proposed 2026-27 budget, emphasizing the need to combat child poverty across the state. By ensuring adequate funding and resources through progressive taxation, California can effectively tackle the challenges posed by income inequality and safeguard vital social welfare programs.

data.title: RealTime eClinical Solutions names Jeff Kozloff CEO, aiming to boost growth. Jeff has 25 years of experience.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 12, 2026, RealTime eClinical Solutions, a prominent player in clinical research software technology, revealed the appointment of Jeff Kozloff as their new Chief Executive Officer. Jeff, with over 25 years of experience, will spearhead the company’s future growth strategies.

data.title: Kyle Addington appointed to IFG's President's Advisory Council; President and Director of Financial Planning at American Wealth Advisers, PLLC.
data.description: In Goodyear, Arizona on January 12, 2026, Independent Financial Group, LLC (IFG), a privately held independent wealth management provider, extends congratulations to Kyle Addington, President and Director of Financial Planning at American Wealth Advisers, PLLC. He has been appointed to a new position within IFG's team.

data.title: Control Devices acquires Sherwood Valve, expanding flow control solutions in gas applications. ST. LOUIS, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: Control Devices, a company under HBM Holdings based in St. Louis, revealed their acquisition of Sherwood Valve on January 12, 2026. This move aims to broaden their flow control solutions in various gas applications, such as industrial, specialty, high-purity, and medical gas. This acquisition indicates the company's strategic expansion in the industry.

data.title: Denison Consulting & Newmeasures merge to shape future of employee listening & org performance in 2026. Characters: 93
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Ann Arbor, Michigan, it was reported that Denison Consulting and Newmeasures have merged to enhance employee listening practices and organizational performance. The collaboration, which became effective on January 1, 2026, involves the combination of the two entities through a legal agreement. This move signifies a strategic effort to bolster the future of employee engagement and productivity.
